title: Essential Membership
description: Start your proactive health journey with Essential Membership. Annual screening, priority booking, and 10% service discount.

blocks.headline: Essential Membership
blocks.subtitle: Start your proactive health journey. Annual screening, priority booking, and 10% off all services.

blocks.heading: Core Benefits
blocks.bodyText: Everything you need to maintain your health and access Cocoon care.

cards.title: First-Time Members
cards.description: Experience Cocoon care without major commitment. See if our approach fits your needs.

cards.title: Generally Healthy
cards.description: Maintain wellness with annual check-ins and proactive monitoring.

cards.title: Budget-Conscious
cards.description: Access premium care at £95/month — an accessible entry point to private healthcare.

cards.title: Starting Proactive Care
cards.description: Begin your preventive health journey with solid foundations and expert guidance.

blocks.heading: Your Onboarding Experience
blocks.bodyText: Your membership begins with a comprehensive onboarding appointment designed to establish your baseline and set goals.

steps.title: Health Questionnaire
steps.description: Complete detailed health history before your visit so we can prepare.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: 45-minute appointment with comprehensive health screening and assessment.

steps.title: Results Review
steps.description: Follow-up call to discuss findings and answer your questions.

steps.title: Action Plan
steps.description: Personalised recommendations and plan for the year ahead.

blocks.heading: Simple, Transparent Pricing
blocks.bodyText:
Monthly: £95/month

Annual (Save £114): £1,026/year

Includes: Annual health screening worth £395, 10% off all services, priority booking.
